author_ancestry_benchmark.Q_column: Q2 (Mediterranean ancestry; chosen by the author labels and MED references)
author_ancestry_benchmark.published_result: SINE mean Mediterranean ancestry 11.2%, significantly above every other locality; six SINE fish at 15-40% were interpreted as late-generation backcrosses

source_sample_set_mismatch.guardrail: the released PED and Q/metadata bundles differ by three non-benchmark Atlantic fish; ancestry benchmarks use explicit IDs, never positional alignment

source_summary_inconsistency.interpretation: the reported minimum is impossible; raw Q values are authoritative here

conversion.allele_orientation: lexicographically smaller nominal allele REF; not reference-genome orientation

direction_head.model: StandardScaler plus multinomial logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
direction_head.representation: mean and population SD over g=2..16 for each of 27 non-depth coordinates; identical to the external-panel depth grid
direction_head.score_interpretation: uncalibrated out-of-distribution score; not a probability or posterior
direction_head.training_selection: all positive canonical replicates at every migration rate

gate_head.model: StandardScaler plus binary logistic regression (lbfgs, C=1)
gate_head.representation: selected depth rows plus across-depth mean of 27 non-depth coordinates
gate_head.score_interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not the canonical 243-D gate probability
gate_head.training_target: positive migration with rate >=2.5e-4 versus weak positives plus control

guardrail: Sparse recipient-ascertained SNP-chip/WGS transfer diagnostic; not an unbiased accuracy estimate. The VIGO contrast is not a pristine no-flow null.

external_expectation.direction_basis: source demographic/ancestry interpretation; the ancestry contrast alone is not directional
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both matched trios polymorphic on one shared callable-site intersection
external_expectation.published_benchmark: SINE mean Mediterranean ancestry 0.111878 versus PENI 0.044890

filter_contract.cap_method: fixed-seed reservoir over eligible loci, restored to source order
filter_contract.filter: PASS or dot (sources are author-filtered releases)
filter_contract.polymorphism: both REF and ALT must be called across every declared three-population panel
filter_contract.variant: single-base REF and single-base ALT; no multiallelic ALT

model_free_comparator.interpretation: reference-invariant frequency projection; not a temporal-direction estimator

simulation_feature_shift.reference: StandardScaler fitted to 2,700 positive regen_full summaries on the identical g=2..16 grid

simulation_gate.interpretation: depth-matched uncalibrated OOD score; not a probability or posterior

simulation_head.interpretation: uncalibrated OOD scores; not probabilities or posteriors

external_expectation.expected_gate: must not reproduce the SINE-positive contrast
external_expectation.guardrail: reversed low-contrast specificity panel, not proof of absolute no flow
external_expectation.locus_filter_variant: both matched trios polymorphic on one shared callable-site intersection
external_expectation.published_benchmark: VIGO mean Mediterranean ancestry 0.036501 versus PENI 0.044890
